message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array of 3 objects. Each object: question field: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback and compliance boolean.

We need to evaluate the given final section of thesis introduction. The questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list chapters. So compliance false. Feedback: text does not list sections; mention.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It does not describe sections. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So false.

Thus all false. Provide feedback accordingly.

Return JSON array exactly.
